'''B'Knos''' was an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony located within the [[Abran asteroid belt]] in the [[Abran system]].<ref name="TBSB" /> The system was sometimes called the '''B'Knos system''' after this colony.<ref name="CSWE" />

==History==
In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], it came under [[Raid on B'Knos colony|attack]] by the invasion force of the [[Ssi-ruu]]k. Presumably, all colonists were killed or [[Entechment|enteched]]. Later, at 35:8:16, as part of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] cover-up, it was reported that the supply [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Ambitious]]'' had crashed into the colony due to unusual solar activity.<ref name="TBSB" />

{{Planet-stub}}
